steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank completes: “filmmakers relied on film critics to influence the public's ______ the world of cinema.” The next sentence explains how: critics drew similarities between film and traditional art forms to “legitimize film as an art form.” Legitimizing something changes how people view or think about it. The blank must name what critics were influencing — the public's view, understanding, or attitude toward cinema.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — contribution to: The public's contribution to cinema is not mentioned anywhere in the passage. ✗
  • Choice B — perception of: Perception means how someone views or understands something — exactly what critics would shape by legitimizing cinema as an art form. ✓
  • Choice C — reproduction of: The passage says nothing about reproducing cinema. ✗
  • Choice D — application to: The public's application to cinema makes no sense in context. ✗
B is correct.
